memoryArtifacts.headline: Pedigree of The de Vere Family, Earls of Oxford
Frances Howard, by Hans Holbein the Younger, c. 1535

memoryArtifacts.description:
Henry Howard, Earl of Surrey Frances de Vere, the daughter of John de Vere, 15th Earl of Oxford, and Elizabeth Trussell. They had two sons and three daughters:

Thomas Howard, 4th Duke of Norfolk (10 March 1536 – 2 June 1572), married (1) Mary FitzAlan (2) Margaret Audley (3) Elizabeth Leyburne.
Henry Howard, 1st Earl of Northampton, who died unmarried.
Jane Howard, who married Charles Neville, 6th Earl of Westmorland.
Margaret Howard, who married Henry Scrope, 9th Baron Scrope of Bolton.
Katherine Howard, who married Henry Berkeley, 7th Baron Berkeley.

sourceList.title: Frances Vere Howard, "Find A Grave Index"
The Howard papers : with a biographical pedigree and criticism

zh.lifeSummary: 當Frances de Vere於1517年出生在英國艾可卡素 丁加姆時，她的父親John de Vere 15th Earl of Oxford35歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Trussel Countess of Oxford21歲。她於1531年2月13日與Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1577年6月30日在英國素福爾可享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可福拉苗林加姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, mostly from Vair in Ancenis, named with Gaulish ver(n)- ‘alder’. This was the probable home in the 11th century of the Breton lord Aubrey (Albericus) de Ver, who followed William the Conqueror to England and founded an influential family who held the earldom of Oxford until 1703. In a few cases the surname could be from other places in France, such as Ver in Manche and Calvados, which have the same etymology as Vair.
French (mainy Vendée; Veré): variant of Vairé, from Old French vairie ‘variegated, spotted’, applied as a nickname for someone who has freckles.

nameMeanings.name: Frances
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Francis .  In the 16th century the two spellings were used indiscriminately for both sexes, the distinction in spelling not being established until the 17th century.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Frances de Vere was born in 1517, in Castle Hedingham, Essex, England, her father, John de Vere 15th Earl of Oxford, was 35 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Trussel Countess of Oxford, was 21. She married Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke on 13 February 1531, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 30 June 1577, in Suffolk, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Framlingham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Frances de Vere est née en 1517, à Castle Hedingham, Essex, Angleterre, son père, John de Vere 15th Earl of Oxford, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Trussel Countess of Oxford, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke le 13 février 1531, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 juin 1577, à Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Framlingham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Frances de Vere 1517 in Castle Hedingham, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Vere 15th Earl of Oxford 35 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Trussel Countess of Oxford 21. Sie hat am 13. Februar 1531 in England, United Kingdom Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. Juni 1577 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Suffolk, England und wurde in Framlingham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Frances de Vere è nata il nel 1517 nel Castle Hedingham, Essex, England, sua padre, John de Vere 15th Earl of Oxford, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Trussel Countess of Oxford, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke il 13 febbraio 1531, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 30 giugno 1577, nel Suffolk, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Framlingham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Frances de Vereが1517年にイギリスエセックスカストル ヘディンガムで生まれた時，父John de Vere 15th Earl of Oxfordは35歳，母Lady Elizabeth Trussel Countess of Oxfordは21歳であった。1531年2月13日にイギリスイギリスでHenry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Dukeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1577年6月30日にイギリススフォルクで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクフラムリンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Frances de Vere(이)가 1517년 영국 에세스 카스틀 헤딩함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Vere 15th Earl of Oxford(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Trussel Countess of Oxford(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1531년 2월 13일 영국 잉글랜드에서 Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1577년 6월 30일 영국 수폴크에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 프램링함에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke em 13 de fevereiro de 1531, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de junho de 1577, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Framlingham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Frances de Vere родилась в 1517 г. в местности кастл хедингхам, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Vere 15th Earl of Oxford было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Trussel Countess of Oxford, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke 13 февраля 1531 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 30 июня 1577 г. в местности суффолк, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности фрамлингхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Frances de Vere nació en 1517, en Castle Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Vere 15th Earl of Oxford, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Trussel Countess of Oxford, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Henry Howard Earl Marshal of England, 3rd Duke el 13 de febrero de 1531, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 30 de junio de 1577, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Framlingham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
